text.title: Critical-Issue Triage Protocol Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Critical-Issue Triage Protocol end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: intake-findings
step.action: List each observable finding with one-line evidence.

step.name: score-severity
step.action: Apply severity 0..4 per finding from the calibrated rubric.

step.name: band-frequency
step.action: Convert raw counts into SINGLE / FEW / MANY / MOST bands.

step.name: apply-context
step.action: Tag each row with REVENUE-CRITICAL / REGULATED / INTERNAL / OTHER; bump severity per modifier rule.

step.name: matrix-lookup
step.action: Pick action from matrix; record overrides with one-line justification.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Owner signs the artefact; commit JSON to the triage store; route same-day items to eng.
